chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 531 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1.2.2018 For orders on MA 488/18 For orders as to non-prosecution Mr. Raja Hansraj Naurang, advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall provide legal protection to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in court gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner, shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioner as is provided to the other citizens of this country. In view of above undertaking of learned A.A.G., learned counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
